ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was last updated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "image" TEXT /* URL of the movie image */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Production budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue of the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the movie */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the director (if applicable) */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards won by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of not helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre pair */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watch_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who watched the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that was watched */,
  "watched_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user watched the movie */,
  "watched_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of time the user watched the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that was recommended */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used to generate the recommendation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the algorithm */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the algorithm */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used by the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
